subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter thou didst write to his honour Ahmad was perused [3.5s]... ...You wrote that it had been stated in the Hablu'l-Matin published at Rasht that the Bahais were partisans of the Autocracy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بجناب آقا احمد مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @unity of governments; political unity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @non-participation in politics
